quantification_methods: MS1 intensity based label-free quantification method

publications.ref: Bennike TB, Kastaniegaard K, Padurariu S, Gaihede M, Birkelund S, Andersen V, Stensballe A. Proteome stability analysis of snap frozen, RNAlater preserved, and formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded human colon mucosal biopsies. Data Brief. 2016 Feb 6;6:942-7. eCollection 2016 Mar

Characteristics[OrganismPart].evidence: 24 colon mucosa biopsies, extracted from the sigmoideum

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].value: high throughput gel free quantitative proteomics
Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: The samples were analyzed by high throughput gel free quantitative proteomics

Characteristics[Treatment].reasoning: 複数の保存方法が実験条件として記載されており、これらが処理条件として扱われる可能性が高い
Characteristics[Treatment].needs: SDRFでの処理条件の分類方法の確認

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: ヒト結腸粘膜生検サンプルを用いたラベルフリー定量プロテオミクス実験。健常者由来のS状結腸粘膜組織を3つの異なる保存方法で処理した比較研究。生物種、組織部位、疾患状態、実験手法は確定。保存方法の扱い（処理条件かサンプル特性か）が要検討。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: A 1:50 (w/w) trypsin:protein ratio dissolved in 50 µL digestion buffer was added to the spin filter, and the samples were digested overnight at 37 °C

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: alkylate with 50 mM chloroacetamide (Sigma-Aldrich, St. Louis, MO, USA) for 20 min at 37 °C

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: Protein disulfide bonds were reduced with 12 mM tris(2-carboxyethyl)phosphine (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA) for 30 min at 37 °C

Characteristics[Label].evidence: A label-free quantative analysis was performed in MaxQuant 1.5.1.2

Characteristics[Modification].evidence: All standard settings were employed with carbamidomethyl (C) as a static modification

Characteristics[Modification].1.evidence: protein N-terminal acetylation, deamidation (NQ), oxidation (M) and peptide N-terminal formylation as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].2.evidence: protein N-terminal acetylation, deamidation (NQ), oxidation (M) and peptide N-terminal formylation as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].3.evidence: protein N-terminal acetylation, deamidation (NQ), oxidation (M) and peptide N-terminal formylation as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].4.evidence: protein N-terminal acetylation, deamidation (NQ), oxidation (M) and peptide N-terminal formylation as variable modifications

Comment[Separation].evidence: The peptide material was loaded onto a 2 cm trapping reversed phase Acclaim PepMap RSLC C18 column (Dionex), and separated using an analytical 50 cm reversed phase Acclaim PepMap RSLC C18 column

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製の詳細が明確に記載されている。トリプシン消化、TCEP還元、クロロアセトアミドアルキル化を確認。ラベルフリー定量でカルバミドメチル化（静的修飾）とアセチル化、脱アミド化、酸化、ホルミル化（動的修飾）を設定。逆相クロマトグラフィーによる分離を使用。エンリッチメントや分画は実施されていない単純なショットガンプロテオミクス実験。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: coupled online with an emitter for nanospray ionization (New objective picotip 360-20-10) to a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, USA)

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: selecting up to 12 precursor ions with a mass window of m/z 1.6 based on highest intensity for HCD fragmenting

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: selecting up to 12 precursor ions with a mass window of m/z 1.6 based on highest intensity for HCD fragmenting

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: coupled online with an emitter for nanospray ionization (New objective picotip 360-20-10)

Comment[CollisionEnergy].evidence: at a normalized collision energy of 27

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: which was increased to 30% solvent B on a 180 min ramp gradient

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: at a constant flow rate of 300 nL/min

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].reasoning: Q Exactive Plusは通常orbitrap質量分析計だが、テキスト中にMS2アナライザーの明示的記述がない
Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].needs: MS2アナライザーの明示的記述またはメソッドファイル情報

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].reasoning: MaxQuantの標準設定を使用したと記載されているが、具体的な値は明記されていない
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].needs: MaxQuantの標準設定値の確認またはメソッド詳細

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: 質量分析装置はQ Exactive Plusに確定（アンカーのQ Exactiveから更新）。HCD断片化、nanoESI、DDA取得、NCE 27、180分グラジエント、300 nL/min流速を確定。MS2アナライザーとmissed cleavages数は推定可能だが明示的記述なし。質量許容値は記載なし。

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: Colon mucosal biopsies were sampled from the sigmoideum of two gastroenterologically healthy participants

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: Colon mucosal biopsies were sampled from the sigmoideum of two gastroenterologically healthy participants

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.evidence: Filename pattern shows 3 technical replicates per condition (numbered 1, 2, 3) for each participant and treatment combination

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].evidence: 24 raw files total: 2 participants × 4 treatments × 3 technical replicates

FactorValue[Treatment].evidence: Four different preservation methods described: (1) directly frozen biopsies (DF), (2) RNAlater biopsies, FFPE biopsies either immediately (iFFPE) stabilized or stored for 30 min (sFFPE) before stabilization

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: 実験設計が明確化: 2名の健常参加者から結腸粘膜生検を採取し、4種類の保存方法（DF, RNAlater, iFFPE, sFFPE）で処理、各条件3回の技術的反復測定を実施。計24ファイルで2×4×3の完全要因計画。生物学的反復数2、技術的反復数3、治療因子として保存方法を確定。分画は実施されておらず、温度・疾患・化合物等の追加因子は該当なし。
